ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the NBA team */,
  "signed_players" INTEGER /* Number of signed players */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of players */,
  "active_cap" REAL /* Active salary cap */,
  "dead_cap" REAL /* Dead salary cap */,
  "total_cap" REAL /* Total salary cap */,
  "lux_tax_space" REAL /* Luxury tax space */,
  "cap_space" REAL /* Cap space */,
  "practical_cap_space" REAL /* Practical cap space */,
  "coaching_tenure" INTEGER /* Coaching tenure */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "turnover_percentage" REAL /* Turnover percentage */,
  "nba_year" INTEGER /* NBA year */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_position_detail" TEXT /* Detailed position (e.g., Point Guard, Shooting Guard) */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each head coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the head coach */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the head coach in years */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the head coach */,
  "coach_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "coach_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the coach */,
  "coach_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the coach */,
  "coach_previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams coached */,
  "coach_honors" TEXT /* Honors and awards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* NBA season */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base salary of the player */,
  "bonuses" REAL /* Bonuses received by the player */,
  "total_salary" REAL /* Total salary including bonuses */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., base, bonus, deferred) */,
  "salary_source" TEXT /* Source of the salary (e.g., NBA, endorsements) */,
  "salary_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the salary (e.g., performance-based, guaranteed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating for the game */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating for the game */,
  "turnover_percentage" REAL /* Turnover percentage for the team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "game_city" TEXT /* City where the game was played */,
  "game_state" TEXT /* State where the game was played */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "game_referees" TEXT /* Referees who officiated the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., guaranteed, non-guaranteed) */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
